products.title: Google Pixel 10 - Unlocked Android Smartphone - Gemini AI Assistant, Advanced Triple Rear Camera, Fast-Charging 24+ Hour Battery, and 6.3" Actua Display - Indigo - 128 GB (2025 Model)
products.description: Escape the ordinary - Google Pixel 10. It has Pixel’s most powerful chip, an incredible camera, and Gemini built in to supercharge your productivity and creativity.[1] The Google One Premium 2TB plan, Fitbit Premium, and YouTube Premium trial offers are available to eligible users of each service with the purchase and activation of Pixel 10. Offers expire at 11:59 pm PT on October 31, 2026. Valid form of payment required at sign-up, but you will not be charged the $9.99/mo for Google One, $9.99/mo for Fitbit Premium or $13.99/mo for YouTube Premium until the respective trial period expires and the subscriptions auto-renew. Cancel anytime. Return of purchased device may result in cancellation of all subscriptions. Fitbit Premium content and features may change, are not available in all countries, and may be in English only. See gstore for more information

products.title: Apple iPhone 13, 128GB, Green - Unlocked (Renewed)
products.description: The iPhone 13 features a 6.1-inch (155 mm) display with Super Retina XDR OLED technology at a resolution of 2532×1170 pixels and a pixel density of about 460 PPI with a refresh rate of 60 Hz and Dolby Vision HDR. Additional features include a dual-camera system, consisting of a 12MP F1.6 wide-angle and another 12MP F2.4 ultra-wide camera with True Tone flash and lens correction. Both rear cameras have larger sensors with improved light sensitivity and Dolby Vision HDR video recording, but only digital zoom and no optical zoom. The front-facing ultra-wide camera is a 12MP F2.2 one. The iPhone 13 video recording supports 4K videos at 60fps as well as 1080p video at up to 240fps. The iPhone 13 model is available in six colors: Midnight, Starlight, Product Red, Blue, Pink, and Green.
